title: coleus mirus
intro: Coleus mirus, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of India and other parts of Asia. It is a member of the mint family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of forskolin, a compound that has been shown to have various health benefits. The health benefits of Coleus mirus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Coleus mirus can be found in supplement form, such as capsules or tablets, and are often used to support weight loss, improve exercise performance, and enhance overall well-being.
